title: 1:12 Brushless Fast Rc Cars for Adults Fast 42 MPH,Off Road Rc Car 4X4,Remote Control Car for Adults 4WD High Speed Racing RC Buggy with 3S 2200 mAh Suitable for Gifts
features: BRUSHLESS POWER & VERSATILE SPEED: This RC car/truck packs brushless motors (2845 3600KV ) high-torque, with metal heatsinks . Paired with a 35A waterproof ESC (2S/3S compatible) and independent receiver, it delivers smooth acceleration, stable high-speed performance, and upgradeable potential.Powered by a 3S 2200mAh Li-Po, it hits 50km/h easily; swap the included motor gear to reach 70km/h (42mph) for thrills.

CRASH-RESISTANT BUILD + STUNT-CAPABLE FUN：This RC truck is built to handle rough play—starting with a tough 2mm-thick PVC shell that stands up to impacts. Its heavy-duty front anti-collision setup soaks up shocks to keep the body intact, so you won’t stress over accidental bumps. Rugged chassis parts boost unstoppable bashing performance.This truck keeps up with your excitement, no slowdowns from crashes.

ALL-TERRAIN RC TRUCK: Conquer Any GroundThis versatile RC truck crushes all terrain, thanks to natural rubber tires with a new tread pattern for superior grip—effortlessly handling uneven ground, mud, grass, and sand.16*71mm adjustable oil-filled metal hydraulic shocks, paired with oil-filled absorbers, cut high-speed shaking. Stay confidently in control, no matter how rough the path gets.

FULLY EQUIPPED FOR EASY CONTROL：This off-road RC truck comes with a 2.4GHz 3-channel remote (350 METERS Control Distance) — Use the 'TH.D/R' to adjust speed modes, ST/TH trim functions for precision.Perfect for new bashers: 35% 60% 100% throttle limit switch lets you build skill before unlocking full speed. Ready for unrestricted off-road fun!

SMART PROTECTION SYSTEM：Integrated safeguards include overheating warnings, low-voltage cutoff, and over-current protection to shield the battery and ESC from damage. An ESC alarm alerts you to low battery, so you never miss a warning—keeping your RC car running reliably for the long haul, perfect for serious adult users.

Note: Using the original charger, it takes approximately 4 hours to fully charge the battery. For faster charging, please use a higher-power charger specifically designed for remote-controlled model lithium polymer batteries (sold separately). A solid green indicator light means the battery is fully charged. If the green indicator light is still flashing, it means the battery is still charging.
